DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT EQUITY OFFICE MANAGEMENT, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET NO. 1, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET NO.1, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. 1; MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION OR OTHERWISE EXPLAIN THE FAILURE TIMELY TO RESPOND. ALL OBJECTIONS TO THE DISCOVERY REQUESTS ARE WAIVED. RESPONSES SHALL BE PROVIDED NO LATER THAN JUNE 17, 2019. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $800 (4 HOURS AT $185 PLUS $60 FILING FEE). CCP 2030.290, 2031.300. PREVAILING TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT BORROWMAN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Frances H. Yoshimura of Law Offices of John A. Biard 925-945-4492 CourtCall appearance for defendant.

Hearing Held, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff shall serve full and complete verified responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request for Production of Documents, Set One; and Request for Statement of Damages, all without objection within twenty days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $560.00 are awarded as against plaintiff and her counsel to be paid within the aforesaid twenty days. Prevailing party to prepare order email Judge Pro Tem directly. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reproted. (D302)

Warren; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Matthew Warren of Clinton & Clinton 562-216-5000 CourtCall appearance for defendant. No other appearances.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EQUITY OFFICE MANAGEMENT, LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Form Interrogatories Set No. 1, Special Interrogatories Set No.1, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No. 1; Motion For Monetary Sanctions.

The motion to compel is GRANTED. Plaintiff did not oppose the motion or otherwise explain the failure timely to respond. All objections to the discovery requests are waived. Responses shall be provided no later than June 17, 2019. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $800 (4 hours at $185 plus $60 filing fee). CCP 2030.290, 2031.300. Prevailing to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
